name: Autologous mitochondrial transplantation for cardiogenic shock in pediatric patients following ischemia-reperfusion injury
short_name: Pediatric cardiac autologous mitochondrial transplantation pilot
summary: A single-center retrospective pilot study comparing pediatric postcardiotomy ischemia-reperfusion injury patients receiving autologous mitochondrial transplantation after revascularization with revascularization-only controls.
venue: The Journal of Thoracic and Cardiovascular Surgery
